title: 8 herbal essential oils for cough in asthma patients
description: Eucalyptus globulus essential oils are a natural remedy for cough relief. They work by opening up airways and reducing inflammation, making it easier to breathe. This is due to the presence of compounds like eucalyptol, a natural decongestant and expectorant. Eucalyptol helps break down mucus, allowing it to be coughed up and relieving congestion. The oil also has anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling in the throat and nasal passages. To use Eucalyptus globulus essen...
